NOTICE OF MOTION TO MODIFY SUPPORT ORDER RE CHILD SUPPORT ON MAY-12-2020 CONTINUED TO CHILD SUPPORT SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUN-02-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 416 - ON COURT'S OWN MOTION, DUE TO THE COVID-19 EPIDEMIC, MATTER IS CONTINUED. THIS CONTINUANCE IS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA GOVERNMENT CODE 68115 AND THE EMERGENCY ORDER OF THE CHIEF JUSTICE OF THE CALIFORNIA SUPREME COURT DATED MARCH 16, 2020. COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER ALL ISSUES PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS IN RE: TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE INSTRUCTIONS.
